summary: Completed testing of 5 priority upgrades for Market Oracle AI Australian Market Intelligence platform. Backend functionality mostly working (96.3% pass rate) with strong API implementations. Frontend components present but experiencing data loading issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 400 Bad Request for RBA monetary policy events due to missing ticker mapping
critical_bugs.impact: Simulation engine cannot process Australian rate events without explicit ticker specification

ui_bugs.issue: Indicators not displaying - stuck in 'Loading macro indicators...' state
No metrics displaying despite API returning data
Only 1 event showing instead of expected 13 events

integration_issues.issue: Frontend components not properly consuming backend API responses despite 200 OK status

passed_tests: Upgrade 1 - Australian Macro API (all fields present, correct CPI 3.8%, GDP 1.4%)
Upgrade 2 - Sector rate sensitivity (24 tickers mapped, CBA bullish on hikes, GPT bearish)
Upgrade 3 - ACLED Events (13 total events, 5 new events acled_009-013)
Upgrade 5 - Transmission Templates (all 5 Australian market mechanisms present)
Frontend - Basic UI loading and map toggle functionality

high_priority: Fix MacroContext component data loading - indicators should display 7 total (5 original + CPI + GDP)
Fix AustralianEconomicContext component - 10 metrics should render with tooltips
Resolve EventSidebar data loading - should show 13 events not 1
medium_priority: Add RBA monetary policy events to event_ticker_mapping.py for CBA.AX, NAB.AX tickers
Verify frontend API consumption timing and error handling
action_item_for_main_agent.note: APIs are working correctly (verified via curl), issue appears to be frontend data consumption/timing
